short_summary: AI restrictions, Iran deal, Venezuela strike
rationale: Anthropic AI suspension for foreign nationals is a new domestic policy development; US airstrike killing Venezuela's Tren de Aragua leader is a direct US military action; Iran deal remains close but unsigned.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US government forces Anthropic to disable AI models for foreign nationals — a significant new federal intervention in AI access affecting US tech industry and international users.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump announces a US airstrike killed the leader of the Tren de Aragua gang — a direct US military action with domestic political implications around immigration and security.

top_events.title: US and Iran say deal close, Lebanon fighting continues
top_events.summary: Iran deal remains unsigned while Lebanon strikes continue; no oil market spike yet but risk of escalation affecting US energy prices and military posture persists.
